calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162.
Cindy Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Kendra Crawford, property manager for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, was placed under oath and examined.
No Appearance by defendant Johnnie Williams.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---San Francisco Authority Dwelling Lease
dated 03/18/05---------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Fourteen Day Notice to Pay Rent or
Surrender Possession dated 03/09/07------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Declaration of Service of Fourteen Day Notice to
Pay Rent or Surrender Possession dated 05/23/07------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority and against defendant JOHNNIE WILLIAMS as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant JOHNNIE WILLIAMS Rent and Per Diem in the sum of $2,470.74, Costs in the amount of $200.00, for a total judgment of $2,670.74.
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 114 Brookdale Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94134. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kendra Crawford, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority
Scott Peebles, Esq., counsel for plaintiff

No appearance by defendant Johnnie Williams.

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
